title: Contract 4 — structured alert (F3 hard-reject) (RFC-008 F24, F62, F61)
description: Serialized into an em-store episode body when the classifier/adapter emits an out-of-vocabulary label or event. F62: alert_type drives an exactly-one relation between the label and event vocab fields, expressed as a JSON-Schema conditional (not prose).

emitted_label.description: rejected label literal; non-null iff classifier_out_of_vocabulary

emitted_event_id.description: rejected event id; non-null iff event_out_of_vocabulary

events_version.description: loaded events.json sha256 at rejection time; non-null iff event_out_of_vocabulary

command.description: raw command (may be empty for non-Bash)

project_root.description: adapter's resolved repo identity (worktree path for a linked worktree), F25

store_root.description: resolveRepoRoot(project_root); main checkout for a linked worktree (F61)

episode_file.description: resolved absolute path to the written episode (under store_root for local scope)
